basic_details.job_title: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Administrative Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Gujarat Vidyapith has officially announced the Administrative Posts Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. Candidates holding a Graduate degree, Bachelor of Naturopathy and Yogic Science, Master's degree, CA, CMA, MBA (Finance), or M.Com. qualification are eligible to apply online on or before 25 July 2026. Age limit details have not been specified and candidates should refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Bachelor of Naturopathy and Yogic Science, Master's degrees, CA, CMA, MBA (Finance), M.Com.
qualification.details: Doctor-Naturopathy (Randheja-1) & Doctor-Naturopathy (Ahmedabad-1): Bachelor of Naturopathy and Yogic Science (BNYS) degree from a recognized University/ Institution. Valid license to practice Naturopathy. Three years of clinical experience as a Naturopathy doctor. Proficiency in botanical medicine, clinical nutrition, hydrotherapy, homeopathy, and lifestyle counseling. Curator - 1: Master's degree in History, Museum Studies, or a related field from recognised University/ Institute. Two years' experience in a museum of repute. Account Officer - 1: Chartered Accountant (CA) OR Cost Accountant (CMA) OR MBA (Finance) / M.Com. with at least 55% marks from a recognized University OR Two-year postgraduate degree/diploma after graduation, or equivalent qualification. Minimum 5 years' post-qualification experience in Finance/Accounts/Audit in University, Government Department, Autonomous Body, PSU, Government-funded Institution or Reputed Organization. Archivist - 1: P.G. Diploma with minimum 55% of marks in Archival Studies from recognized University/Institute with three years' experience in relevant field OR Master's degree or equivalent in Archaeology or Indian History from a recognized University/Institute with three years' experience in a museum of repute. Museum Coordinator - 1: Master's degree with minimum 55% of marks or equivalent in Museology or Conservation or Archaeology or Indian History or Journalism from a recognized University/ Institute. Two years' experience of working in a museum, gallery, or cultural institution. Engineer (Civil) - 1: First Class Bachelor's Degree in relevant field from a recognized Institute/ University or equivalent. Five years' experience in the field of Solid Waste Management / Structural design or Planning / Electrical/Solar Energy Sector / Estate General Maintenance as Engineer or Equivalent in Central/ State Government PWD services or similar organized services/ Statutory or Autonomous organization/ University System or reputed private organizations.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gujarat Vidyapith to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Gujarat Vidyapith Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Doctor-Naturopathy (Randheja-1) & Doctor-Naturopathy (Ahmedabad-1): Bachelor of Naturopathy and Yogic Science (BNYS) degree from a recognized University/ Institution. Valid license to practice Naturopathy. Three years of clinical experience as a Naturopathy doctor. Proficiency in botanical medicine, clinical nutrition, hydrotherapy, homeopathy, and lifestyle counseling. Curator - 1: Master's degree in History, Museum Studies, or a related field from recognised University/ Institute. Two years' experience in a museum of repute. Account Officer - 1: Chartered Accountant (CA) OR Cost Accountant (CMA) OR MBA (Finance) / M.Com. with at least 55% marks from a recognized University OR Two-year postgraduate degree/diploma after graduation, or equivalent qualification. Minimum 5 years' post-qualification experience in Finance/Accounts/Audit in University, Government Department, Autonomous Body, PSU, Government-funded Institution or Reputed Organization. Archivist - 1: P.G. Diploma with minimum 55% of marks in Archival Studies from recognized University/Institute with three years' experience in relevant field OR Master's degree or equivalent in Archaeology or Indian History from a recognized University/Institute with three years' experience in a museum of repute. Museum Coordinator - 1: Master's degree with minimum 55% of marks or equivalent in Museology or Conservation or Archaeology or Indian History or Journalism from a recognized University/ Institute. Two years' experience of working in a museum, gallery, or cultural institution. Engineer (Civil) - 1: First Class Bachelor's Degree in relevant field from a recognized Institute/ University or equivalent. Five years' experience in the field of Solid Waste Management / Structural design or Planning / Electrical/Solar Energy Sector / Estate General Maintenance as Engineer or Equivalent in Central/ State Government PWD services or similar organized services/ Statutory or Autonomous organization/ University System or reputed private organizations.

rows.event: Website closure for submission of online application
Tentative dates for further process of eligible candidates (Interview)
Last date for submission of online application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gujarat Vidyapith to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application for Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 is 25th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Gujarat Vidyapith has announced a total of 7 vacancies for various administrative posts in the recruitment drive of 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories of candidates applying for Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the administrative posts at Gujarat Vidyapith involves an online application followed by an interview, which will be conducted in a hybrid mode.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Account Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Account Officer post, the essential qualifications include Chartered Accountant (CA), Cost Accountant (CMA), MBA (Finance), or M.Com. with at least 55% marks. A two-year postgraduate degree/diploma after graduation is also acceptable.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age limit for the Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limit for the posts announced in Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any specific age criteria.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Doctor-Naturopathy post at Randheja?
faq.answer: The Doctor-Naturopathy post at Randheja offers a monthly salary of Rs. 60,000/- along with accommodation.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, candidates are required to apply online only through the official website of Gujarat Vidyapith. Offline applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The administrative posts announced by Gujarat Vidyapith are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
